message:
fix(fnp-python): clippy -D warnings — use contains over iter().any()

My ma_average UFuncArray refactor in fe1d275 used
  counts.values().iter().any(|&v| v == 0.0)
Clippy's 'contains()' lint fires here. Replaced with
  counts.values().contains(&0.0)
Semantically equivalent, one fewer closure allocation, makes
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
